wins.event: Q3 revenue $9.2B record, +36% YoY; net income +31%; free cash flow tripled YoY
Multiyear OpenAI deal: 6GW Instinct deployment, MI450 series start H2 2026 — potential $100B+ revenue
Data Center $4.3B record (+22% YoY); 5th-gen EPYC Turin nearly half of EPYC revenue
Oracle MI450 lead launch partner (tens of thousands of GPUs from 2026); DOE Discovery supercomputer with MI430X

risks.event: Embedded revenue $857M, -8% YoY; sequential improvement but still in recovery
MI400 / Helios rack platform launch is 2026 — execution risk on multi-billion-dollar opportunity
Sale of ZT manufacturing to Sanmina for $3B — execution dependency on the new partnership for AI rack manufacturing

guidance.notes: AI business on path to tens of billions annually by 2027. OpenAI partnership materially raises long-term TAM. Financial Analyst Day next week to provide updated long-range targets.

_notes: Pinnacle moment for AMD — OpenAI 6GW partnership disclosure with $100B+ revenue potential. CEO confidence at peak. This is the call where the stock had massive pre-call run-up (+55% per pre_21d_excess) and subsequently sold off — classic sell-the-news despite very_bullish actual content.
